nodes.label: AI as research and troubleshooting aid
nodes.grounding_span: I mainly use AI for research purposes or as a means of getting a better understanding of how to use a particular technology

nodes.label: AI as template provider for implementation
nodes.label_negative: AI as untrusted for final implementation
nodes.grounding_span: I will go to AI to provide a template or a sample script to help me get started, especially if I am new to the technology

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to skill development
nodes.grounding_span: How to leverage AI to increase productivity, which will increase my marketability

nodes.label: AI as data analyst and monotonous task handler
nodes.label_negative: AI as incapable of original creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI's best trait is data analysis and working on monotonous tasks with significant human oversight. The core limitation of AI is that it cannot develop new ideas

nodes.label: AI as collaborative sounding board (Iron Man-Jarvis analogy)
nodes.label_negative: AI as mere tool without partnership
nodes.grounding_span: The analogy I would use is how Iron Man collaborates with Jarvis. The goal would be to use it as a sounding board to validate my thinking

nodes.label: AI energy consumption and sustainability
nodes.grounding_span: The future should be about reducing AI's energy consumption instead of focusing on expanding its capabilities

nodes.label: Efficient problem-solving and time saving
nodes.grounding_span: reduce my search time when it comes to looking for the information that I need

nodes.label: Professional competence and marketability
nodes.grounding_span: increase my marketability to my current employer or another company

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as example provider
nodes.grounding_span: I was really satisfied when it showed me a valid example of how to add a database module to JBoss

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: the AI chatbot kept on hallucinating instead of acknowledging it can provide the feedback that I needed

nodes.label: Concern about AI taking over skills
nodes.grounding_span: I am concerned about it taking over most of my skills

nodes.label: Aspirational view of AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: The goal would be to use it as a sounding board to validate my thinking

nodes.label: Advocacy for sustainable AI development
nodes.grounding_span: The future should be about reducing AI's energy consumption

nodes.label: Verification-oriented approach — cross-references AI outputs with documentation
nodes.grounding_span: I will ask it for references to documentation that could provide the missing parameter. If that doesn't work, I just revert back to using Google

nodes.label: Analogical reasoning — uses concrete analogies to conceptualize AI relationship
nodes.grounding_span: The analogy I would use is how Iron Man collaborates with Jarvis
